Split String.name: Split String
Split String.description: Split a string into a list by delimiter

Join Strings.name: Join Strings
Join Strings.description: Join a list of strings with a delimiter

Trim.name: Trim
Trim.description: Remove whitespace or specified characters from string

Format String.name: Format String
Format String.description: Format a string template with named placeholders

String Length.name: String Length
String Length.description: Get the length of a string

Check String.name: Check String
Check String.description: Check if a string matches a condition

Change Case.name: Change Case
Change Case.description: Convert string to a different case

Regex Operation.name: Regex Operation
Regex Operation.description: Perform a regex operation on a string

Find Index.name: Find Index
Find Index.description: Find the index of a substring

Pad.name: Pad
Pad.description: Pad a string to a target length

Is Empty.name: Is Empty
Is Empty.description: Check if a string is empty

Remove Duplicates.name: Remove Duplicates
Remove Duplicates.description: Remove duplicate strings from a list
